sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ فَيْصَلٌ الْحَاسُوبَ وَبَدَأَ كِتَابَةَ رِسَالَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Fejsal je otvorio kompjuter i počeo pisati dugačku poruku.
sentences.translationEn: Faisal opened the computer and started writing a long letter.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَكْتُبُ إِلَى صَدِيقٍ قَدِيمٍ لَمْ يَرَهُ مُنْذُ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Pisao je starom prijatelju kojeg nije vidio godinama.
sentences.translationEn: He was writing to an old friend he had not seen for years.

sentences.translation: Pisao je o vijestima i lijepim sjećanjima.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote about news and beautiful memories.

sentences.translation: Poslao je poruku i s čežnjom čekao odgovor.
sentences.translationEn: He sent the letter and waited eagerly for a reply.
